title: Performance Campaign Analyst (m/f/d)
required_skills: 1-3 years programmatic ad buying, ad operations, or adtech experience
SQL — pulling and analyzing campaign data
matched_skills: Campaign analytics and ROAS measurement (IPC, GRG Banking)
missing_skills: Programmatic advertising / DSP experience — not in CV
core_responsibilities: Execute supply-side and audience optimization tactics
Run A/B tests on bids, budgets, creatives, and geos
Use SQL to pull and analyze campaign data
Leverage LLMs for recurring analyses and performance diagnostics
recommended_emphasis: Lead with campaign analytics and ROAS measurement from IPC role
Highlight A/B testing experience as direct match
Frame Power BI as BI dashboarding capability
Be transparent about programmatic/DSP and SQL gaps
Express interest in LLM/AI-powered workflows — genuine growth area
